Asset.title: Asset
Asset.description: A Blender 3D model/asset listed in the marketplace

description.description: Markdown or plaintext description of the design

category.description: Asset category, e.g., Characters, Props, Environments, Vehicles

imageUrls.description: List of uploaded product image paths (hosted on server or empty)

fileUrl.description: Path on the server to the uploaded .blend asset file

fileName.description: Original name of the .blend asset file

Order.title: Order
Order.description: An order representing a purchase of a paid asset or a free checkout download log

id.description: Stripe Session ID or generated Transaction ID

assetId.description: Reference to the purchased Asset ID

status.description: Payment or transaction status: pending, completed, failed

/orders/{orderId}.description: Collection of asset transactions and downloads
